title: CC and BCC
drDigitalIntro:
CC and BCC send extra copies of an email.
• CC (Carbon Copy) is a visible copy — everyone sees who got it.
• BCC (Blind Carbon Copy) is a secret copy — others can't see it.
• Use CC to keep people informed; use BCC for privacy or large groups.

playgroundTask.goal: You used CC and BCC to send copies of an email

steps.say: Click Compose to start a new email.
Type 'mom@example.com' in the To field, then click another field.
Type 'sister@example.com' in the CC field (everyone will see this).
Type 'me@example.com' in the BCC field (secret copy for yourself).

drDigitalSuccess: CC = visible copy, BCC = secret copy. Now you can share emails with the right people!
drDigitalHint: Fill in each field one at a time. Press Tab to jump to the next box, or click it directly.
